sentences.arabic: حَانَ وَقْتُ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْوَطَنِ بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعَيْنِ مِنَ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Došlo je vrijeme povratka kući nakon dvotjednog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The time came to return home after two weeks of travelling.

sentences.arabic: أَحْزَمْتُ حَقَائِبِي وَتَأَكَّدْتُ أَنِّي لَمْ أَنْسَ شَيْئًا فِي الْغُرْفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Spakirao sam kofere i uvjerio se da nisam ništa zaboravio u sobi.
sentences.translationEn: I packed my bags and made sure I had not forgotten anything in the room.

sentences.arabic: أَدَّيْتُ إِجْرَاءَاتِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ فِي الْمَطَارِ وَوَدَّعْتُ مَوَظَّفَ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Obavio sam odlazne formalnosti na aerodromu i oprostio se od osoblja recepcije.
sentences.translationEn: I completed the departure procedures at the airport and said goodbye to the reception staff.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ فِي الطَّائِرَةِ وَأَنَا أُفَكِّرُ فِي كُلِّ مَا رَأَيْتُهُ وَتَعَلَّمْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Sjedio sam u avionu razmišljajući o svemu što sam vidio i naučio.
sentences.translationEn: I sat on the plane thinking about everything I had seen and learned.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى بَيْتِي مُتْعَبًا لَكِنَّ قَلْبِي كَانَ مَمْلُوءًا بِالذِّكْرَيَاتِ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam kući umoran, ali srce mi je bilo puno lijepih uspomena.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived home tired but with a heart full of beautiful memories.
